name: ecotrack-database
description: Gestion de la base de données EcoTrack (migrations, seeds)

scripts.migrate: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r dotenv/config" dotenv_config_path=../.env node-pg-migrate up -f migrate.config.cjs
scripts.migrate:down: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r dotenv/config" dotenv_config_path=../.env node-pg-migrate down -f migrate.config.cjs
scripts.migrate:redo: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r dotenv/config" dotenv_config_path=../.env node-pg-migrate redo -f migrate.config.cjs
scripts.migrate:status: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r dotenv/config" dotenv_config_path=../.env node-pg-migrate status -f migrate.config.cjs
scripts.migrate:create: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="-r dotenv/config" dotenv_config_path=../.env node-pg-migrate create -f migrate.config.cjs
scripts.fresh: npm run db:fresh && npm run migrate && npm run seed

author: EcoTrack Team
